code: import React,{useEffect,useState}from"react";import{LineChart,Line,BarChart,Bar,XAxis,YAxis,Tooltip,ResponsiveContainer}from"recharts";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function Dashboard(){const[bmiData,setBmiData]=useState([]);const[mealData,setMealData]=useState([]);useEffect(()=>{fetch("/data/weekly_nutrition_summary.json").then(res=>res.json()).then(data=>{setMealData(data);const bmiSample=[{date:"2025-06-10",bmi:24.6},{date:"2025-06-11",bmi:24.7},{date:"2025-06-12",bmi:24.8},{date:"2025-06-13",bmi:24.8}];setBmiData(bmiSample);});},[]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"min-h-screen bg-gray-100 p-6 grid gap-6 grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"rounded-2xl shadow p-4 bg-white col-span-full",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{className:"text-xl font-bold mb-2",children:"BMI Trend"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(ResponsiveContainer,{width:"100%",height:250,children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(LineChart,{data:bmiData,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(XAxis,{dataKey:"date"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(YAxis,{domain:[24.0,25.5]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Tooltip,{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Line,{type:"monotone",dataKey:"bmi",stroke:"#8884d8",strokeWidth:2})]})})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"rounded-2xl shadow p-4 bg-white col-span-full",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{className:"text-xl font-bold mb-2",children:"Meal Frequency"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(ResponsiveContainer,{width:"100%",height:250,children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(BarChart,{data:mealData,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(XAxis,{dataKey:"date"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(YAxis,{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Tooltip,{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Bar,{dataKey:()=>1,fill:"#82ca9d"})]})})]})]});}
